body:
From: ic-no-reply@interact.ccsd.net <ic-no-reply@interact.ccsd.net>
Sent: Sunday, March 22, 2020 7:21 AM
To: swinfield@hotmail.com
Subject: Please check Google Classroom immediately for Updates (10107002-1)


Dear Students and Parents: Update for the week of March 23-27



I posted the Extension Packet for the general school population; however, I am also posting extension exercises for our specific curriculum and I will continue to track your progress in Infinite Campus. I will be accepting your packet for verification of participation in the assignment box labeled, "Extension Packet."Any late or missing grades coursework from 4th quarter can be submitted for FULL CREDIT.



Please catch up on any assignment/assessments not yet submitted as new assignments/assessments will be posted during the upcoming week. All assignments, assessments, materials, texts, audiobook, videos and other ancillary materials/notes provided online in Google classroom.I will continue to teach online via Google Classroom since we all know what to do and there isn't a legitimate reason to discontinue learning. Most assignments can be completed on your smart phone, laptop, computer or ipad. Let me know if you have a particular issue and I will help you to overcome the obstacle any way I can.



Again, you can contact me during my regular school hours (M-F 6am-6pm) using my Google Voice Number at 702-518-7140. Be sure to indicate your name and period when contacting me via text. I will respond within minutes.These issues with the lockdown will eventually be resolved and I don't want my students to fall too far behind. Additionally, I will continue to teach, grade, and be available via text throughout the entire time of our lockdown. I hope you are staying healthy and enjoying your time with your family.



Sincerely,



Ms. Hunt
subject: FW: Please check Google Classroom immediately for Updates (10107002-1)

body:
Yes, that works for me.

I will call you at 1:30pm PST.
________________________________
From: Sunny Azad <sazad@checkpoint.com>
Sent: Monday, March 1, 2021 11:44:07 PM
To: Steve Winfield <swinfield@hotmail.com>
Subject: RE: Meeting?


Hello Steve, how about Tuesday at 1:30 PM PST?



Sunny Azad | Area Manager - Channel Sales | West

408.373.6036 | sazad@checkpoint.com<mailto:sazad@checkpoint.com> | www.checkpoint.com<http://www.checkpoint.com/>

Check Point Software Technologies



From: Steve Winfield <swinfield@hotmail.com>
Sent: Monday, March 1, 2021 2:44 PM
To: Sunny Azad <sazad@checkpoint.com>
Subject: Meeting?



Hi Sunny…



I hope you had a great weekend and your Monday has gone well.



Kevin Cooper mentioned that you and I would be having a conversation this week in regard to the channel opening in the TOLA+ region.



Would you have time Tuesday afternoon or Wednesday morning to meet?



Please advise and I will send you a meeting request if you’d like.



Thanks.



---Steve



swinfield@hotmail.com<mailto:swinfield@hotmail.com>

425-753-8897


Email secured by Check Point
Report Phishing<https://mta-cnf.iaas.checkpoint.com/mta_feedback?id=7f87d0a346bea5b998847fd19af57ba269f97e1b6f75887e9a9e3a1bcafb2785&ck=16CEDF0A967F;3D4CC6C8CB55;C5CEAA199888;&v=m>

December 20.

From: All In One Dental Innovations <info@allin1dental.com>
Sent: Monday, December 11, 2023 11:32:36 AM
To: Steve Winfield <swinfield@hotmail.com>
Subject: Re: Just a reminder from All In One Dental Innovations

Hello Steve,
Unfortunately, Monday, December 18th, and Tuesday, December 19th our schedule will be fully booked. If you would like we do have 9:00 AM available on Friday, December 15th with Dr. James or we have Wednesday, December 20th available with Dr. James at 9:00 AM. Please let us know which would work best for you
Best Regards
Tamie

On Mon, Dec 11, 2023 at 10:59 AM Steve Winfield <swinfield@hotmail.com<mailto:swinfield@hotmail.com>> wrote:
Thanks, but can I reschedule to monday or Tuesday next week?

I can’t make it on Friday.
________________________________
